title: OpeningSchedule
description: OpeningSchedule: The details of roofs from the users excel input.

TypeOfGlazing.description: The type of glazing. TypeOfGlazing: Code which indicates the type of glazing; if U-value is from BFRC or manufacturer declaration, give as one of: single, double, triple.

GlazingGap.description: The glazing gap. GlazingGap: Code which indicates the type of glazing; if U-value is from BFRC or manufacturer declaration, give as one of: single, double, triple.

FrameFactor.description: The frame factor of the opening.

FrameType.description: The type of frame. TypeOfFrame: The opening type defines the thermal properties of a series of openings.

ArgonFilled.description: If the opening is argon filled.

KryptonFilled.description: If the opening is krypton filled.

DataSource.description: The data source for the opening. OpeningDataSource: Code which indicates the source of opening data.

FloorIntersection.description: Does the opening intersect with the floor?

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
